Document:
# Admin Tools & Commands
This page describes the admin tools available for managing the server and rounds.
## Common Admin Commands
[bold]Round control:[/bold] - [mono]forcestart[/mono] — Force start the round immediately - [mono]endround[/mono] — End the current round - [mono]restartround[/mono] — Restart without waiting
[bold]Player management:[/bold] - [mono]kick[username][/mono] — Kick a player from the server - [mono]ban[username][/mono] — Ban a player - [mono]respawn[username][/mono] — Respawn a player
[bold]Entity tools:[/bold] - [mono]spawn[entityId][/mono] — Spawn an entity at your position - [mono]delete[/mono] — Delete the entity you're looking at
## Admin Panel
The admin panel (F7 by default) provides a GUI for common admin actions without needing console commands.
## Content Under Construction
Full admin tools documentation coming soon. Refer to the upstream SS14 documentation for detailed admin command reference.
